free_text: Proton pick-up from F-19, Ne-20 and Ne-22.
The dE-E telescopes consisting of cooled
surface barrier counters were used. The dE counters
were 200 mu-m and the E counters 2 mm thick.
From compiler: the values of level energy are taken
from table 1, page 423.
Absolute error of cross section. In
the case of weakly exited states or heavy background,
additional systematic errors of up to 25% cannot be
excluded.
